anomalies.message: Solutions markdown section header '# 一、填空题' labels Q1-Q8 as fill-in-blank, but these questions are multiple choice. Content and answer mappings are correct; this is a known formatting quirk in the source solutions file.
anomalies.resolution: No action needed. Section header does not affect question content, type classification, or answer mapping.

resolvedAnomalies.resolution: Fixed — D option label confirmed from source paper markdown line 31, option D extracted correctly
